subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Afnán of the Divine Lote-Tree! Render thanks unto the Ever-Living, the Ancient of Days, that thou hast been privileged to attain the presence of the blessed Shrine and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم افنان سدره الهیه شکر حی قدیم را که بزیارت روضه مبارکه مشرف شدی و از
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
